# ZilaWS Documentation Index

ZilaWS is split into two npm packages:
- `zilaws-client` for browser and client-side WebSocket connections
- `zilaws-server` for Node.js and Bun WebSocket servers

Use this file as a stable index for scraping the public documentation.

## Primary Links

- Site: https://zilaws.com/
- Latest docs: https://zilaws.com/docs/intro
- Changelog: https://zilaws.com/docs/changelog
- Sitemap: https://zilaws.com/sitemap.xml
- Source repository for docs: https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs
- GitHub organization: https://github.com/ZilaWS
- Client package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/zilaws-client
- Server package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/zilaws-server

## Latest Version

Latest docs version: 3.0.0

For most scraping and retrieval use cases, prefer the unversioned `/docs/...` URLs. They point to the latest documentation.

## Core Concepts

- Getting started: https://zilaws.com/docs/intro
- Waiters: https://zilaws.com/docs/waiters
- MessageHandlers: https://zilaws.com/docs/messagehandlers

Raw sources:
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/intro.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/waiters.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/messagehandlers.mdx

## Client API

- Connecting: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/connecting
- Sending data: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/sending-data
- Receiving data: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/recieving-data
- Disconnecting: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/disconnecting
- Local events: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/local-events
- Syncing cookies: https://zilaws.com/docs/client-api/syncing-cookies

Raw sources:
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/connecting.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/sending-data.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/recieving-data.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/disconnecting.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/local-events.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/client-api/syncing-cookies.mdx

## Server API

- Starting the server: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/starting-the-server
- Configuring the server: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/config
- Sending data: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/sending-data
- Receiving data: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/recieving-data
- Cookie management: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/cookie-management
- Extending: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/extending
- ILogger: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/ilogger
- Local events: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/local-events
- Stopping: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/stopping
- Terminating connections: https://zilaws.com/docs/server-api/terminating-connection

Raw sources:
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/starting-the-server.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/config.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/sending-data.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/recieving-data.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/cookie-management.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/extending.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/ilogger.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/local-events.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/stopping.mdx
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/blob/main/docs/server-api/terminating-connection.mdx

## Versioned Docs

- Version 3.0.0: https://zilaws.com/docs/3.0.0/intro
- Version 2.2.x: https://zilaws.com/docs/2.2.x/intro
- Version 2.1.x: https://zilaws.com/docs/2.1.x/intro

Raw versioned sources:
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/tree/main/versioned_docs/version-3.0.0
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/tree/main/versioned_docs/version-2.2.x
- https://github.com/ZilaWS/docs/tree/main/versioned_docs/version-2.1.x

## Scraping Notes

- The documentation is generated by Docusaurus from MDX files.
- Prefer raw MDX files from GitHub when you need stable source text.
- Prefer rendered `https://zilaws.com/docs/...` pages when you need the public page structure and navigation.
- Ignore embedded playground iframes for core API documentation; the surrounding MDX contains the authoritative explanations.
- The project intentionally uses the misspelled path segment `recieving-data` in existing URLs. Keep that spelling when linking to those pages.
